notification.title: Human decision required: Rollout window
notification.body: Worker worker:builder reports that Tuesday and Thursday are both technically viable rollout windows. Scheduling ownership and dependency-freeze risk require human judgment. Which rollout day should be selected: Tuesday or Thursday?
notification.payload: <toast><visual><binding template="ToastGeneric"><text>Human decision required: Rollout window</text><text>Worker worker:builder reports that Tuesday and Thursday are both technically viable rollout windows. Scheduling ownership and dependency-freeze risk require human judgment. Which rollout day should be selected: Tuesday or Thursday?</text><text placement="attribution">attention:rob</text></binding></visual></toast>
